title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 522.170 - What defendant may plead
text:
522.170.  What defendant may plead. — The defendant in such action may plead payment of the principal sum and interest due by the condition of such bond, before the commencement of such action, although the payment was not strictly according to such condition.
(RSMo 1939 § 3264) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2877; 1919 § 1027; 1909 § 1234
